lemma_statement.name: CHRONOS_GRAVITY_STACK_BINDING_SOUNDNESS_LEMMA
lemma_statement.statement: For the declared dashboard source-map layer, if each gravity source object is read only through its declared Chronos stack slot and every downstream consumer preserves the declared no-promotion boundary, then the binding map is structurally admissible as a source-indexing input.

boundary: No analytic gravity theorem is claimed.
No four-dimensional collapse theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted non-symmetric collapse theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted cosmic censorship theorem is claimed.
No hoop conjecture result is claimed.
No unrestricted primordial black hole formation theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted primordial black hole evaporation theorem is claimed.
No dark matter detection is claimed.
No dark matter resolution is claimed.
does_not_prove: unrestricted primordial black hole formation theorem
unrestricted primordial black hole evaporation theorem
